CustomField.formula: IF( Pro_Days_Left_To_Scheduled_Delivery_Date__c >= 30, IMAGE("https://leaseworks-carlyle--c.vf.force.com/resource/1727948760000/Green?", "Green",20,20) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(Pro_Days_Left_To_Scheduled_Delivery_Date__c, 0)) & " days remaining", IF( AND(Pro_Days_Left_To_Scheduled_Delivery_Date__c > 0, Pro_Days_Left_To_Scheduled_Delivery_Date__c < 30), IMAGE("https://leaseworks-carlyle--c.vf.force.com/resource/1727950613000/Yellow?", "Yellow",20,20) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(Pro_Days_Left_To_Scheduled_Delivery_Date__c, 0)) & " days remaining", IF( Pro_Days_Left_To_Scheduled_Delivery_Date__c <= 0, IMAGE("https://leaseworks-carlyle--c.vf.force.com/resource/1727950641000/Red?", "Red",20,20) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(Pro_Days_Left_To_Scheduled_Delivery_Date__c, 0))& " Target days has passed", "" ) ) )
CustomField.label: Days Left To Scheduled Delivery Date
